title: Portfolio
text:
Note



This portfolio showcases my work in strategic marketing, data analysis, and global business strategy. Each project demonstrates my ability to combine analytical thinking with creative execution to drive impactful results.












Important



Focus: Digital Campaign Strategy | Social Media | Influencer Marketing
Goal: Increase donations from college students




I developed a full digital campaign targeting college students using a mix of social media, influencer marketing, and paid advertising.







Built content around community, storytelling, and fundraising

Designed posts to highlight real-world impact





Targeted college-based influencers (100k+ audience)

Created structured content guidelines to drive engagement





Implemented interest-based targeting

Built retargeting campaigns for higher conversions

Optimized using cost-per-click metrics





Designed a campus ambassador program

Proposed campus partnerships and live activations






Strategic marketing • Campaign design • Influencer marketing • Data-driven targeting











Tip



Focus: Excel Analysis | Workforce Data | Business Insights
Dataset: 700+ employees







Range: $26,000 → $425,000

Executives: $140K+

Entry roles: $26K–$40K





Majority: “Meets Expectations”

High performers concentrated in leadership/technical roles





Strong female representation in leadership roles

Trends driven by role—not gender





Largest roles: Customer Service, Stocking, Inventory

Smaller leadership segment drives highest salaries












Note



Compensation and performance are primarily influenced by role specialization and experience, emphasizing the importance of data-informed workforce planning.






Data analysis • Excel • Business intelligence • Insight generation







Developed a strategy for expanding Patagonia into Kazakhstan by analyzing economic conditions, sustainability trends, and market potential.





Growing demand for outdoor products

Strong alignment with sustainability trends

Limited competition in premium outdoor segment






Enter via joint venture

Adapt products to extreme climate

Position as premium, sustainability-driven brand





Market analysis • Global strategy • Competitive positioning







Evaluated launching U.S. cookies adapted with dulce de leche for the Argentinian market.





Strong snack culture

Economic barriers (inflation, tariffs)

High cultural alignment with product






Localize product

Target urban middle-class market

Leverage local partnerships





Consumer analysis • Market research • Localization strategy







Developed a plan to export premium California wine into South Africa’s growing market.





Rising demand for premium imports

Strong opportunity in tourism/hospitality

Risks: currency volatility and tariffs






Partner with local distributors

Focus on premium branding

Use experiential marketing (events, tastings)





Export strategy • Pricing • Financial analysis







Analyzed Apple’s global positioning and financial performance.





Premium pricing reinforces brand strength

Strong differentiation through innovation

High operational efficiency





Apple’s success is driven by brand identity, ecosystem integration, and innovation leadership.




Financial analysis • Competitive benchmarking • strategy







Analyzed whether Auchan should exit or remain in the Russian market during geopolitical conflict.





Revenue impact

Brand reputation

Political risk

Global strategy alignment






Maintain presence with adjusted operations

Expand e-commerce channels

Improve stakeholder communication





Decision-making • risk analysis • global strategy







Examined a Supreme Court case on police checkpoints and constitutional rights.




Do suspicionless roadblocks violate the Fourth Amendment?




They were ruled unconstitutional.





Importance of regulatory compliance

Legal frameworks shape operational decisions





Legal analysis • critical thinking • policy awareness











Important



This portfolio demonstrates my ability to integrate marketing strategy, data analysis, and global business thinking to solve complex problems and deliver meaningful results.

title: Portfolio
text:
Important



This portfolio demonstrates my ability to integrate marketing strategy, data analysis, and global business thinking to solve complex problems and deliver meaningful results.

title: Professional Summary
Social Media Engagement Analysis
text:
Overview
This analysis examined engagement metrics across multiple social media platforms to identify content trends, audience preferences, and posting strategies that drive performance.




Learning Outcomes

Aggregate and clean social media data.

Identify high-performing content formats.

Understand audience behavior and peak times.

Support social strategy with data-backed recommendations.

Visualize results in an executive summary.




Key Skills Gained

Social analytics

Platform metric APIs

Content performance tracking

Audience insights

Strategic planning

title: Customer Segmentation Using Clustering
text:
Overview
In this analysis, customer data was segmented using clustering algorithms to identify meaningful groups. These segments informed targeting strategies and personalization efforts.




Learning Outcomes

Clean and prepare customer-level data.

Apply clustering techniques to group similar customers.

Interpret clusters to define marketing personas.

Recommend tailored messaging strategies.

Support targeted campaign development.




Key Skills Gained

K-means clustering

Data preprocessing

Customer profiling

Market segmentation strategy

R or Python for machine learning

title: Campaign Insights Dashboard
text:
Overview
This project involved building a dashboard to track and visualize marketing campaign performance. Metrics like click-through rate, conversion rate, and ROI were tracked across channels using R and Tableau.




Learning Outcomes

Visualize and monitor key marketing metrics.

Analyze performance trends across multiple campaigns.

Identify high- and low-performing segments.

Communicate insights through interactive visuals.

Develop data-informed recommendations.




Key Skills Gained

Dashboard development

Campaign analytics

Data wrangling in R

Tableau or R Shiny visualization

Performance measurement

title: Hi, I’m Ilya Khanal
text: I’m an International Business and Marketing student at Cal Poly Pomona with a strong interest in marketing analytics and digital strategy. I enjoy using data and creative strategy to understand consumer behavior and improve marketing performance.

title: Hi, I’m Ilya Khanal
text:
About Me
I am currently pursuing my degree in International Business and Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona. Through my coursework and hands-on experiences, I have developed a strong foundation in both digital marketing and data-driven decision-making.

Let’s Connect

Welcome to my portfolio.

title: SEO Benchmarking Analysis
text:
Overview
This project compared SEO performance across competitors, highlighting keyword gaps, backlink profiles, and content effectiveness. Insights were used to guide an improved content and SEO strategy.




Learning Outcomes

Identify keyword opportunities through competitive research.

Track and compare domain authority and page rankings.

Recommend on-page SEO improvements.

Design a data-driven SEO content strategy.

Visualize competitor positioning.




Key Skills Gained

Keyword research

Web scraping & data cleaning

SEO analysis tools

Data storytelling

Strategy development

title: Marketing Funnel Attribution Model
text:
Overview
This project developed a marketing attribution model to assign credit to touchpoints throughout the conversion journey. The insights supported channel optimization and budget reallocation.




Learning Outcomes

Track multi-touch customer journeys.

Model attribution using first-touch, last-touch, and linear approaches.

Visualize funnel performance.

Quantify channel impact on conversion.

Guide future campaign investment decisions.




Key Skills Gained

Attribution modeling

Funnel analysis

Data visualization

Campaign performance analysis

R or Python analytics pipelines

title: Marketing Analytics
text:
Below are selected projects that highlight my experience applying marketing analytics to real-world challenges. These projects reflect my ability to combine statistical tools, campaign data, and strategic thinking to inform decisions and drive results.
Whether developing dashboards, analyzing campaign performance, or uncovering insights through SEO and web analytics, each project is rooted in turning complex marketing data into clear, actionable strategies.

title: Marketing Analytics
text:
What You’ll Find

Campaign Performance Analysis: Evaluating the effectiveness of digital marketing efforts using data.
Data Visualization: Turning raw datasets into intuitive dashboards and reports.
Marketing Mix & Attribution: Exploring how different channels contribute to success.
Customer & Market Insights: Using analytics to better understand user behavior and optimize experiences.
